claims.statement: Each row of M has sum 14.
Each column of M has sum 7.
The off-diagonal overlap spectrum of Q is exactly {4:15, 5:60, 9:30}.
The derived graph obtained by declaring i~j iff Q[i][j] = 9 is connected, 4-regular, and has diameter 3.
The ordered distance-count profile of the overlap-9 graph is exactly {0:15, 1:60, 2:120, 3:30}.
For the overlap-9 graph, the derived adjacency and distance matrices are symmetric, have zero diagonal, and the adjacency matrix has constant row sum 4.
The transport cocycle supplies a lawful chart-change interpretation for the object.
The public G60 console is a visualization/demo layer and is not the proof kernel.
A Z2-valued cocycle representative on the 30 edges of G15 is fixed as theorem-facing data.
The cocycle representative has edge-sign counts 10 parallel and 20 crossed.
Within its switching class, the cocycle has minimal support size 6.
The cocycle has at least one odd-holonomy cycle and is therefore nontrivial.
